goals.title: Scaffold
goals.objective: Set up polyglot pnpm/Turbo monorepo — packages/{core,data,shared}, apps/{web,api}, Python apps/agent, root tooling, tsconfig, env templates, .gitignore

goals.title: Shared
goals.objective: packages/shared — Zod schemas, shared TS types, domain constants (1-45, 6 picks, KRW1000), disclaimer/responsible-use copy

goals.title: Core
goals.objective: packages/core — number generation, validation, exact-historical-jackpot exclusion, tagging, statistics; single source of truth with unit tests

goals.title: Data
goals.objective: packages/data — SQLite+Drizzle schema (draw_results, recommendations, result_checks), LotteryResultProvider interface, dhlottery JSON provider + committed seed backfill, migrations, WAL

goals.title: API
goals.objective: apps/api — hot-path POST /api/recommendations (resolve targetDrawNo, freshness sync, API generates numbers, one stateless /explain call, stamp fallbackUsed, disclaimers), POST /api/recommendations/save, dev POST /api/agent/run, read-only /internal/* tools, sole DB writer

goals.title: Agent
goals.objective: apps/agent — Python LangGraph compact /explain graph + full six-node dev graph, NVIDIA NIM glm-5.1 via OpenAI-compatible base_url, Pydantic structured output, model-agnostic + graceful fallback, Langfuse hooks

goals.title: Web
goals.objective: apps/web — recommendation + result-tracking UI, 19+ responsible-use/entertainment-only UX, developer/traces screen

goals.title: IntegrationVerify
goals.objective: One-command dev (pnpm/Turbo + concurrent Python, no Docker), AC1-AC15 tests + CI gates, verify-before-build checklist incl. one live glm-5.1 call using NVIDIA_NIM_KEY + dhlottery reachability; final ai-slop-cleaner + verification + code-review gate

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-scaffold Scaffold; G002-shared Shared; G003-core Core; G004-data Data; G005-api API; G006-agent Agent; G007-web Web; G008-integrationverify IntegrationVerify
